section_miscategorizations.text: A recent MRI is needed to rule out other causes.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an explicit diagnostic plan/order (need for MRI) rather than an assessment statement.

section_miscategorizations.text: A spinal tap is also indicated to evaluate intracranial pressure.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This describes a planned procedure to be performed, which belongs in the management plan.

section_miscategorizations.text: Referral to a neuro-ophthalmologist is recommended for a complete eye exam.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Referrals are management actions and should be documented in the Plan section.
